text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm waiting for a scrimmage to start<n>when I hear
some of the participants<n>chatting with each other.

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what it is... I just<n>haven't been able
to improve my<n>time lately.

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text:
Tell me about it. I'll be glad if I don't<n>finish last
today...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, you two. ☆ It sounds like<n>you've lost
sight of your own<n>marvelous spark! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
But don't you worry, because it's<n>still there—I can
see it plain as day! ☆<n>Let's make this race a
marvelous<n>one! ★

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text: Wha—huh? What's this now?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, sorry about that. I've got her from<n>here.
Excuse us!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What's the big idea, Marvelous?<n>Why are you
talking up your<n>opponents just before the race?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
I wanted them to notice the<n>marvelous effort
they've been<n>putting in! ☆ Then our race will be
marvelous too! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nerves are just a foreign concept to<n>you, huh?
Shouldn't you worry about<n>yourself first?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I know you haven't been feeling the<n>greatest
lately.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
No matter my condition, I'm always<n>marvelous! ☆
The sun might set<n>sometimes, but the stars are
always<n>in the sky! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
So thanks, but don't worry about a<n>thing! ☆ Just
sit back and watch my<n>marvelous race! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it's time for the race to begin.<n>Under the
watchful eyes of the<n>audience, the competitors line
up at<n>the starting gate, and the race begins!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Maintaining a steady pace near the<n>back, we have
Marvelous Sunday!<n>It's still anybody's race at
this<n>point—how will this play out?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ugh. She's definitely not in her best<n>condition. I
hope she doesn't hurt<n>herself...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahahahahaha! ☆ Time to go into<n>marvelous
overdrive!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday rushes forward!<n>In barely a
moment, she's taken the<n>lead!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Take a good look, everyone! This is<n>what it means
to be maaarvelooous!<n>☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's fast—and only getting faster!<n>The winning
post is in sight... and<n>Marvelous Sunday maintains
her<n>lead, handily claiming first place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you took first from so<n>far back. I
don't know whether to be<n>impressed or worried
at how reckless<n>you are.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Did you feel it, Nature? ☆ Excitement,<n>passion,
joy—all that marvelousness<n>has filled the air! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
But it's still not enough—not by a long<n>shot! ☆
Therefore, my marvelous<n>running must continue! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
For it is my belief that the world can<n>always be
more marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh... Right...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday is approached by<n>the two
competitors she talked to<n>before the race. They
look excited.

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, what was that crazy<n>dash you did
near the end? It was<n>incredible! You made me go
all out<n>trying to keep up!

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text:
How can we learn to run like you?<n>You've gotta
teach us! Please!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: You don't have to run likeme—you've been marvelous from thestart! ☆ Once you realize that, dreams,goals—everything will fall into place!★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uh, I think they were looking for<n>something more
specific. You know,<n>like training techni—

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
I... I can feel my heart burning with<n>passion! Is this
what it means to be<n>marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text: I can feel it too! Marvelous!<n>Maaarvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: That's ☆ marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha... Ahahaha... I'll, uh, leave you<n>youngsters to
it...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Find your own "marvelous," huh? If<n>it'll improve
my time, I guess it can't<n>hurt to try it out...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Marvelous. ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit, Nature! Welcome to<n>the world of
Marvelous! ☆★☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: You heard that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Marvelous Sunday is approached by<n>the two
competitors she talked to<n>before the race.

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text:
You were really fast out there. I've<n>never seen
anyone dash like that<n>before.

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text:
I had to push pretty hard to not eat<n>your dust...
Thanks. I almost forgot<n>what that felt like.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Make sure you hold onto that feeling,<n>'cause
that's what it means to be<n>marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You youngsters adapt quick, huh? Not<n>sure I can
keep up.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Still, can't say I didn't feel a little<n>inspired by that
all-out dash.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Really?! All right! We'll get you fired<n>up and feeling
marvelous in no time,<n>Nature! ☆
